message:
✨ Make commit list items link to their PRs (#1349)

Extract PR numbers from commit messages (e.g. (#1343)) and make
each commit row a clickable link to the GitHub PR. Falls back to
linking to the commit if no PR number is found.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -866,15 +866,27 @@ function CommitList({ commits }: { commits: Array<{ sha: string; message: string {expanded && (
- {commits.map((commit) => ( -
- {commit.sha.slice(0, 7)} -
-

{commit.message}

-

{commit.author} · {formatCommitDate(commit.date)}

-
-
- ))} + {commits.map((commit) => { + const prMatch = commit.message.match(/\(#(\d+)\)/) + const url = prMatch + ? `https://github.com/kubestellar/console/pull/${prMatch[1]}` + : `https://github.com/kubestellar/console/commit/${commit.sha}` + return ( + + {commit.sha.slice(0, 7)} +
+

{commit.message}

+

{commit.author} · {formatCommitDate(commit.date)}

+
+ + ) + })}
)}
